paragraphs: I'm a full-stack web developer who loves solving hard problems. Whether it's a production bug that's costing you revenue, a deployment that won't cooperate, or a feature that needs to ship yesterday — I'm the person you call.

I've worked with startups, agencies, and solo founders across industries. My approach is simple: understand the problem deeply, communicate clearly, write clean code, and ship fast. No fluff, no overcomplicated solutions.

When I'm not coding, I'm writing about debugging techniques and deployment tips on my blog. I believe every developer should be able to debug efficiently — it's the skill that separates good from great.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: I start by understanding your problem, codebase, and goals. Clear scope means fewer surprises.

process.title: Plan
process.description: I outline the approach, estimate time, and communicate what I'll do before writing any code.

process.title: Build / Fix
process.description: I write clean, well-structured code. For debugging, I use systematic methods to isolate and fix issues.

process.title: Test
process.description: Every change is tested — manually and/or with automated tests. I verify edge cases.

process.title: Deliver
process.description: I deliver with clear documentation of what was done, why, and how to maintain it going forward.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: I show up, communicate clearly, and deliver on time. Every time.

values.title: Clarity
values.description: No jargon, no mysteries. I explain what I did and why, so you're never in the dark.

values.title: Maintainability
values.description: I write code that your future self (or next developer) will thank you for.
